history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white portrait of a young woman with long, dark, wavy hair, styled with her hand brushing through it. She is wearing a simple black t-shirt and light-colored, loose-fitting pants with a drawstring. A delicate necklace with a cross pendant is visible around her neck, and she wears bracelets on her wrists. There are faint glitter or light reflections on her cheek. She is looking off to the side with a slightly pouty expression. The background consists of a textured wall on the left and a dark, paneled door on the right. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating subtle shadows and highlighting the textures of the wall and clothing. The overall mood is casual, reflective, and slightly moody.
